name: Starmon

signature_move.name: Meteor Squall
signature_move.description: 12Causes small meteors to rain down on the enemy.Rams the enemy in star form while glowing.

description: A Planet Digimon that was accidentally discovered within planet-analyzing software at a space development center. It is a space warrior equipped with a star-shaped armor suit, and star-marked gloves and boots. Its tattered yellow scarf indicates Starmon's combat experience. The eyes at the center of its body are burning with fighting spirit, and are able to convey its will to the opponent without even saying a word. In addition, it can also hypnotize the opponent as an advanced way of using them. It is a hot-blooded Digimon that looks up to the hero, Leomon . Its Special Move is causing small meteors to rain down on the enemy ( Meteor Squall ).
